topic: Program 5 (Craft/Home/Mobile) at 0% interest up to OMR 20K — who qualifies and how to apply
format: List the 9 documents a complete feasibility study includes — and what each one tells the bank
post:
A bank submission without a feasibility study isn't a submission — it's a wish.

If you're applying for Program 5 (Craft, Home Business, or Mobile Business) through Development Bank Oman, here's what a complete feasibility study actually contains — and why each section matters to the reviewer:

1. Executive Summary — the one-page answer to "what is this?"
2. Business Description — legal structure, activity, location
3. Market Analysis — demand, competitors, your edge
4. Operations Plan — how you deliver, daily
5. Management Profile — who's running it and why they can
6. Financial Projections — revenue, costs, break-even
7. Funding Request — how much, for what, repayment plan
8. Risk Assessment — what could go wrong and your response
9. Supporting Documents — CR, ID, quotes, approvals

Program 5 offers 0% interest up to OMR 20,000. No finance cost. Real capital sitting there — but the bank needs to see a study that actually holds together before they'll release it.

Most applications stall at section 6. People write numbers without explaining where those numbers come from. A reviewer can't approve logic they can't see.

If you want to get past that stage, build your feasibility study free in around 10 minutes — it covers all 10 Development Bank Oman / Riyada programs: https://www.thesmartpro.io/feasibility-studio?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feasibility
